info.title: Lowca API — Unimplemented Endpoints
info.description:
OpenAPI specification for Lowca features not yet implemented on the mobile client.

**Response Envelope:** All endpoints return a standard envelope:
```json
{ "status": 200, "message": "Success", "data": <T>, "errorCode": null }
```
The `data` field contains the schema documented per endpoint.

**Authentication:** All endpoints (except public ones) require `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` header.

tags.name: GroupOrdering
tags.description: Group session, nominations, voting, shared cart, escrow checkout, order fulfilment

tags.name: VendorVerification
tags.description: Ghost Pin creation and the moderator → vendor verification lifecycle

tags.name: Reputation
tags.description: Vendor tier calculation, geo-fenced review submission, and velocity checks

tags.name: PlatformEconomy
tags.description: Subscription management, Flash Boost ads, vendor wallet

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: System campaigns, restaurant vouchers, GPS push campaigns

post.summary: Create a new group ordering session
post.description: Host creates a group session. Returns the session with a unique inviteToken for sharing.

get.description: Poll every 5 seconds to detect status changes (lobby → voting → ordering → checkout → fulfilled).

delete.summary: Expire / close a group session (Host only)

403.description: Only the Host may close a session

post.summary: Join an existing group session via invite token

409.description: Session status does not allow joining (voting or later)

post.summary: Nominate a branch to the session shortlist
post.description: Only allowed when session status is `lobby`.

409.description: Branch already nominated or session not in lobby status

delete.summary: Remove a nomination (Host only, lobby phase only)

403.description: Only the Host may remove nominations

post.summary: Start the voting phase (Host only)
post.description: Requires at least one nomination. Transitions session status from `lobby` to `voting`.

403.description: Only the Host may start voting

get.summary: Get live vote tallies (poll every 5 s)

post.summary: Cast one vote on a nominated branch
post.description: Each member may cast exactly one vote. Session must be in `voting` status.

409.description: Member already voted or session not in voting status

post.summary: Close voting and declare winner (Host only)
post.description: Winner is the branch with most votes; first-nominated branch wins ties. Transitions status to `ordering`. Locks `winnerBranchId` immutably.

200.description: Voting closed — returns updated session with winnerBranchId

403.description: Only the Host may close voting

get.summary: Get the shared cart (poll every 3 s during ordering phase)

post.summary: Add a dish to the shared cart
post.description: Item is attributed to the calling user. Session must be in `ordering` status and cart must not be locked.

put.summary: Update quantity of own cart item
put.description: Members may only update their own items. Cart must not be locked.

post.summary: Lock cart and initiate checkout (Host only)
post.description: Locks the cart for 5 minutes. Host selects payment method. Funds collected upfront via VietQR/bank transfer and held in escrow.

200.description: Checkout initiated — cart is now locked

403.description: Only the Host may initiate checkout

409.description: Cart is empty or session is not in ordering status

get.summary: Get checkout / escrow status (poll every 5 s)

delete.summary: Cancel checkout and unlock cart (Host only, before payment completes)

403.description: Only the Host may cancel checkout

post.summary: Vendor accepts the group order
post.description: Releases escrow funds to the vendor. Transitions session to `fulfilled`.

post.summary: Vendor rejects the group order
post.description: Triggers immediate full refund to Host's wallet. Transitions session to `rejected`.

get.description: Available only after session is `fulfilled`. Shows per-member item breakdown.

post.summary: Create an unverified Ghost Pin for an unknown stall
post.description: Ghost Pins are hidden from standard search — visible only to the creator and moderators on the discovery map layer.

403.description: Access denied — not creator or moderator

post.summary: Moderator approves a Ghost Pin for the verification pipeline
Moderator rejects a Ghost Pin
Vendor claims ownership of an approved Ghost Pin

200.description: Ghost Pin claimed — status transitions to `claimed`

post.summary: Moderator completes physical on-site audit
post.description: Requires moderator GPS within 10 metres of the stall. On success sets `isVerified = true` on the linked Branch, unlocking full menu/schedule features.

200.description: Audit complete — Ghost Pin status set to `verified`

400.description: Moderator GPS is more than 10 metres from the stall

get.summary: Get the current tier of a branch
get.description: Tier is derived from the sliding window of the last 20 reviews. Possible tiers: `diamond`, `gold`, `silver`, `warning`.

post.summary: Submit a review for a branch
post.description: Requires user to be within 50 metres of the stall (GPS geo-fence). Velocity limits: max 1 review per stall per day, max 3 total per day.

400.description: User is not within 50 metres of the stall

429.description: Velocity limit exceeded — max 1 review per stall/day, 3 total/day

get.summary: Check remaining review quota for the current day
Get the current vendor subscription status

post.summary: Subscribe or renew a vendor subscription
post.description: Active subscription required for search visibility and Pro features. 403 is returned on protected endpoints when subscription is inactive.

post.summary: Purchase a Flash Boost ad placement
post.description: Pins the branch to the top 3 search results for nearby users (within 2 km) matching the branch's filters for the specified duration.

post.summary: Withdraw funds to vendor bank account
post.description: Platform charges a flat 5,000 VND withdrawal fee.

get.description: Only available to Silver tier or higher vendors. Diamond vendors are auto-enrolled.

post.summary: Opt in to a system campaign

get.description: Returns active voucher campaigns from verified vendors near the user (or all if no location provided).

post.summary: Vendor creates a direct-claim voucher campaign
post.description: Requires active subscription and verified vendor status.

403.description: Active subscription or verified status required

get.description: Returns paid push campaigns from vendors within range of the user's current location.

SessionStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a group session

PaymentMethod.description: Supported payment methods for group checkout

CheckoutStatus.description: Status of the checkout / escrow flow

GhostPinStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a Ghost Pin

VendorTierLevel.description: Vendor tier derived from the last 20 reviews. TierWeight: diamond=1.5, gold/silver=1.0, warning=0.5

winnerBranchId.description: Set immutably when Host closes voting. Null until voting closes.

displayName.description: Optional label shown in the lobby, e.g. 'Lunch crew'

myVote.description: True if the calling user voted for this branch

isLocked.description: True while checkout is in progress (5-minute lock)

vietQrPayload.description: VietQR deep-link / payload string, present when paymentMethod is viet_qr

linkedBranchId.description: Set after vendor claims the pin and the branch record is created/linked

moderatorLat.description: Moderator GPS latitude — must be within 10 m of the stall

digitalIdScanned.description: Confirms moderator scanned vendor digital ID

qrStickerApplied.description: Confirms QR sticker was physically applied to the stall

reviewCount.description: Total reviews in the last-20 sliding window

isBombingShieldActive.description: True when Review Bombing Shield has frozen tier recalculation (6+ negative reviews in 60 min)

lat.description: User GPS latitude — must be within 50 m of the stall

canReviewTotal.description: False when daily total of 3 reviews is reached

stalledReviewedToday.description: Branch IDs the user already reviewed today (max 1/stall/day)

durationHours.description: How long to pin the branch to top-3 results

budgetVnd.description: Optional daily spend cap in VND

amountVnd.description: Amount to withdraw in VND (before fee)

bankCode.description: VietQR bank code e.g. VCB, TCB, MB

isAutoEnroll.description: True for Diamond tier vendors — automatically enrolled

discountValue.description: Percentage (0–100) or fixed amount in VND depending on discountType

campaignType.description: push_marketing = GPS-triggered notification; voucher = direct-claim discount
